category_sources: Official MediaConch page describes implementation checking, policy checking, reporting, and fixing for audiovisual files.
source_facts.description says it is a conformance checker and technical metadata reporter.
display_name_sources: Official MediaArea project branding uses MediaConch.
docs_sources: Official MediaArea Data Format page documents MediaConch report formats.
Official MediaArea How To Use page is dedicated MediaConch documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official MediaConch project page.
repo_sources: Official packaging metadata and project links identify MediaArea as developer; official issue/source links point to MediaArea/MediaConch while source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official MediaConch page names Matroska, LPCM, and FFV1 audiovisual conformance targets.
source_facts.description identifies conformance checking and metadata reporting.
